legend.title: Generated Tomb of Horrors
legend.backstory: Somewhere under a lost and lonely hill lies a labyrinthine crypt. It is filled with terrible traps, strange guardians, and rich treasures—but the true nature of the place is known only to the one who built it.
locale_options: The highest hill on the plains
An unmapped island in the great lake
In the wastes of the desert
At the border of the northern duchy
On an island beyond the realm of the sea barons
legend.dm_notes: This is a thinking person's module. Negotiation requires caution and observation. Read keyed areas as players arrive; never give information characters would have no way of knowing.

areas.name: Entrance to the Tomb
areas.description: The corridor is of plain stone, roughly worked, dark and full of cobwebs. Daylight reveals a pair of doors at the end.

clues.text: Go back to the tormentor or through the arch.

areas.name: Great Hall
areas.description: Massive columns support the ceiling. The floor is mosaic; the walls show scenes of strange significance.

traps.description: Stone block slides shut; 10 counts to escape. Iron bar on floor can wedge it.

areas.name: Shrine
areas.description: Scenes of life are painted on the walls, but the figures show rotting flesh and skeletal hands.

clues.text: If you find the false you find the true.
The script warns: "Into the columned hall you'll come, and there the throne that's key and keyed."

areas.name: Winding Passage
areas.description: Dust hangs in the air. Faint scratches mark the floor where others have passed.

doors.open_method: 7 studs — press all to open; 1 & 7 bring door falling inwards for 3-18 h.p. damage

traps.description: Easily detectable needle on catch; avoid by pressing with dagger pommel.

areas.name: Cubicle
areas.description: A smallish chamber with bare stone. No obvious exit save the way you came.

areas.name: Puzzle Room
areas.description: An archway blocks the path. Stones set into the frame glow when approached—yellow, blue, orange.

areas.name: Corridor
areas.description: Dust hangs in the air. Faint scratches mark the floor where others have passed.

areas.name: False Crypt
areas.description: The end of the adventure—one way or another—is near. A crypt with a single notable feature.

switches.description: Lever or stud; toggling disarms a distant trap.

traps.description: Stone block slides shut; 10 counts to escape. Iron bar on floor can wedge it.
Easily detectable needle on catch; avoid by pressing with dagger pommel.

switches.description: Lever or stud; toggling disarms a distant trap.

clues.text: Go back to the tormentor or through the arch.
If you find the false you find the true.
The script warns: "Into the columned hall you'll come, and there the throne that's key and keyed."
